name: Devil's Food Cake # 2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
To make the cake: Preheat oven to 350°F. Butter and lightly flour two 8-inch round cake pans. Place cocoa, powdered sugar, and water in a small pan and cook over low heat until smooth and blended. Remove from heat and stir in milk; set aside.
Cream butter, add vanilla and 1/2 cup powdered sugar, beat until light. Beat in yolks and gradually add cocoa mixture. Mix well. Mix flour, cream of tartar, salt, and baking soda, add to first mixture and blend until just smooth. Beat egg whites until foamy. Slowly add remaining powdered sugar, beat until stiff but not dry. Fold whites into batter. Spread batter into prepared pans and bake until toothpick inserted into center comes out clean (about 25-30 minutes). Cool in pans for 5 minutes before turning onto wire racks.
Frosting: Stir together all ingredients except vanilla. Bring to a rolling boil, cook stirring vigorously for 1 minute. Let cool completely. Add vanilla and beat until thick. Frost cake.
